title: 📜 FINALIZED RULES FOR THE NAMING STRUCTURE & UNIVERSAL SYSTEM
content:
📜 FINALIZED RULES FOR THE NAMING STRUCTURE & UNIVERSAL SYSTEM

🚀 This document is the complete and absolute system definition 🚀

✅ Covers ALL naming conventions, numbering rules, and hierarchy.
✅ Includes universal number rules (excluding drafts).
✅ Defines the snapshot system for seamless consistency.
✅ Ensures sortability, continuity, and logical progression.

📌 UNIVERSAL NUMBERING SYSTEM

✅ The universal number applies to ALL levels EXCEPT Level 1 (drafts).
✅ The universal number continuously increments across ALL modules.
✅ Each new entry gets the next available number sequentially, regardless of module.
✅ If a new entry is inserted later, it receives a decimal number to maintain order.

📌 Example:

AAA.001 → AAA.002 → AAA.003 → … → BBB.016 → CCC.031 → DDD.046

📌 Insertion Example (New Entry Between AAA.003 and AAA.004):
